description_en: I'm turning 17 on June 16th this year! Tonight I got a small room, a cake, too many nameplates to count, and friends showing up from different corners of VRChat. This one gets its own place in the gallery flow.
description_zh: 今年的6月16日，我就要17岁了！今晚我得到了一个小房间、一块蛋糕、数不过来的名字牌，还有从 VRChat 各个角落赶来的朋友。这一晚值得在相册流里拥有自己的位置。
